candidates.summary: Tell ws:9001 to abort G3 and dispatch ffp-ship directly
candidates.reasoning: ws:9001's ffp-unit-writer is green (commit 6305a120a72). The local E2E suite is over-saturated with 4 concurrent runs. Test-only PR — Jenkins runs the same suite remotely so we can skip the local G3 step.

params.send_text: STOP G3. Your unit-writer is GREEN. The local E2E suite is over-saturated. Press Esc to abort ffp-runner, then dispatch /architect-ffp:ffp-ship directly. Test-only PR doesn't need local G3 — Jenkins runs the same suite remotely.
